testName: should display the user greeting on the dashboard
errorPattern: Dashboard greeting text was not displayed within 10 seconds

fix.summary: Dashboard greeting renders as h1 (with comma + name + '!'), not header h2. Use a partial text match on h1 and a regex that allows the full string.
fix.pattern: Replace $('header h2') with $('h1*=Good'); use waitForDisplayed({ timeout: 15000, timeoutMsg: 'Dashboard greeting text was not displayed within 15 seconds' }). Update the assertion regex from /Good\s+(morning|afternoon|evening)/i to /Good\s+(morning|afternoon|evening),\s*.+!/i.

investigationFindings: Triage PR #278 / commit 6ca5b6e: failure was the greeting element not found in time; learn-webapp now renders the greeting in an h1 with comma + name + exclamation. Old `header h2` selector simply doesn't exist anymore.
rootCauseChain: SELECTOR_MISMATCH -> stale `header h2` assumption -> waitForDisplayed timeout
